for hospice services 

 CITY_HOSP 
 City of hospital at which hospitalization occurred 

 STATE_HOSP 
 State of hospital at which hospitalization occurred 

 PDGNS_DESC 
 Description of principal diagnosis code for MSPB index hospitalization 

 LEAD_NPI_NAME 
 Name of EP with plurality of cost for MSPB 

 LEAD_NPI

 Specialty of EP with plurality of cost for MSPB
